package rulecoverage

import (
    "bufio"
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for bufio_reader_missing_for_small_read_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: File or socket reads inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
type CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopModel
}

type CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBufioReaderMissingForSmallReadLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "bufio_reader_missing_for_small"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
    _ = reader
    bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative := map[string]int{"bufio": 1, "reader": 2, "missing": 3, "small": 4, "read": 5, "loop": 6}
    bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bufio_negative_0 := bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["bufio"] + len(input)
    _ = bufio_negative_0
    reader_negative_1 := bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["reader"] + len(input)
    _ = reader_negative_1
    missing_negative_2 := bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_negative_2
    small_negative_3 := bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["small"] + len(input)
    _ = small_negative_3
    read_negative_4 := bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative["read"] + len(input)
    _ = read_negative_4
    for loop_negative_5Index, item := range items { bufio_reader_missing_small_read_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_5Index }
    return nil
}
